title: juncus bufonius
intro: Juncus bufonius, also known as toad rush or bufonius, is a type of plant that belongs to the Juncaceae family. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties. The health benefits of Juncus bufonius include its ability to treat respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma, as well as its potential to lower blood pressure and reduce fever. Juncus bufonius can be prepared into various herbal remedies, including teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are often used to treat various health conditions.
